'''favuyu''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Nouns|noun]] meaning "[[Wikt:meanderthal|meanderthal]] (auto-generated)". It has inherent '''child''' gender.

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| f-v-y
|-
! Word class
| [[Noun]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:meanderthal|meanderthal]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Inherent gender
| child
|-
! Citation form
| favuyu
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:fæviyith|fæviyith]] || [[word:fæviyij|fæviyij]] || [[word:fæviyish|fæviyish]] || [[word:fæviyi|fæviyi]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:favuvuyuth|favuvuyuth]] || [[word:favuvuyuj|favuvuyuj]] || [[word:favuvuyush|favuvuyush]] || [[word:favuvuyu|favuvuyu]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:favuyuth|favuyuth]] || [[word:favuyuj|favuyuj]] || [[word:favuyush|favuyush]] || [[word:favuyu|favuyu]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:favufyuth|favufyuth]] || [[word:favufyuj|favufyuj]] || [[word:favufyush|favufyush]] || [[word:favufyuf|favufyuf]]
|}

''16 forms generated.''

== Case paradigm ==
''Shown for child singular.''
{| class="wikitable"
! Case !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[Agent]] || [[word:favuyuthu|favuyuthu]] || [[word:favuyuju|favuyuju]] || [[word:favuyushu|favuyushu]] || [[word:favuyuku|favuyuku]]
|-
| [[Patient]] || [[word:favuyuth|favuyuth]] || [[word:favuyuj|favuyuj]] || [[word:favuyush|favuyush]] || [[word:favuyu|favuyu]]
|-
| [[Possessive]] || [[word:favuyuthul|favuyuthul]] || [[word:favuyujul|favuyujul]] || [[word:favuyushul|favuyushul]] || [[word:favuyukul|favuyukul]]
|-
| [[Instrumental]] || [[word:favuyuthuthu|favuyuthuthu]] || [[word:favuyujuju|favuyujuju]] || [[word:favuyushushu|favuyushushu]] || [[word:favuyuku|favuyuku]]
|-
| [[Dative]] || [[word:favuyuthun|favuyuthun]] || [[word:favuyujun|favuyujun]] || [[word:favuyushun|favuyushun]] || [[word:favuyukun|favuyukun]]
|-
| [[Speaker]] || [[word:favuyuthuoro|favuyuthuoro]] || [[word:favuyujuoro|favuyujuoro]] || [[word:favuyushuoro|favuyushuoro]] || [[word:favuyukuoro|favuyukuoro]]
|}

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki nouns]]
[[Category:Aelaki child nouns]]
[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|386eaa0}}
